positive: A stylized, neo-geometric arrangement of lush forest elements: overlapping fern leaves, curling ivy vines, and exotic tropical blooms, rendered in a minimalist, high-contrast silhouette style. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, forming a beautiful, decorative wreath or border. Use a deep jewel-tone color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, and rich indigo, with highlights appearing as metallic gold or bright ivory accents. The style must be crisp, clean line art with solid, flat color blocks, perfectly optimized for a seamless repeat or a central apparel print. Focus on strong, readable shapes and negative space.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, artifacts, noisy, messy, low detail, writing, illegible, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, grayscale, sepia
